Popular consumer and team password manager.

Ad slot — category middle

Open source projects in this category

Bitwarden

Open source password manager with free cloud and self-host options.

License: GPL-3.0 / AGPL-3.0 Self-host: ★★☆☆☆

Vaultwarden

Lightweight Bitwarden-compatible server in Rust.

License: AGPL-3.0 Self-host: ★☆☆☆☆

KeePassXC

Offline password database — KeePass-compatible.

License: GPL-3.0 Self-host: ★☆☆☆☆

Disclaimer: licensing, features and pricing change. Verify each tool's current status on its official site before committing.
